    Deprecated API

    Contents

    • Terminally Deprecated
    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Terminally Deprecated Elements
      Element
      Description
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getFrom() and PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getFrom() and PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getFrom() and PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getFrom() and PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.PlayerChangePlotEvent.getMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerChangePlotEvent.getFrom() and PlayerChangePlotEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.getMapHUDUsers()
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.getPermHUDUsers()
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.isMapHudActive(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.isPermHUDActive(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.removeMapHUDUser(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.removePermHUDUser(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.utils.PlayerCacheUtil.cacheBlockErrMsg(Player, String)
      Unused by Towny now, use PlayerCache.setBlockErrMsg(String) instead.
    • Deprecated Methods
      Method
      Description
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.db.TownyDataSource.newNation(String)
      Use TownyDataSource.newNation(String, UUID) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.db.TownyDataSource.newResident(String)
      Use TownyDataSource.newResident(String, UUID) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.nation.NationCalculateNationLevelNumberEvent.setNationlevelNumber(int)
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getFrom() and PlayerEntersIntoDistrictEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getFrom() and PlayerEntersIntoTownBorderEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getFrom() and PlayerExitsFromDistrictEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.player.PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getPlayerMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getFrom() and PlayerExitsFromTownBorderEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.event.PlayerChangePlotEvent.getMoveEvent()
      This event no longer includes the delegate PlayerMoveEvent. Use PlayerChangePlotEvent.getFrom() and PlayerChangePlotEvent.getTo() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.getMapHUDUsers()
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.getPermHUDUsers()
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.isMapHudActive(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.isPermHUDActive(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.removeMapHUDUser(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.huds.HUDManager.removePermHUDUser(Player)
      since 0.102.0.8
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.Government.setUUID(UUID)
      Changing UUIDs of Government objects is no longer supported.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.Resident.setUUID(UUID)
      Changing UUIDs of Resident objects is no longer supported.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.TownyWorld.getTowns()
      use TownyWorld.getTownsInWorld() instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.TownySettings.getNationLevel(int)
      Use TownySettings.getNationLevel(Nation, int) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.TownySettings.getNationLevelWithModifier(int)
      Use TownySettings.getNationLevel(Nation, int) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.TownySettings.getResidentCountForTownLevel(int)
      Use TownySettings.getTownLevel(Town, int) and TownySettings.TownLevel.modifier() if you really need to
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.TownySettings.getTownLevel(int)
      Use TownySettings.getTownLevel(Town, int) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.TownySettings.getTownLevelWithModifier(int, Town)
      Use TownySettings.getTownLevel(Town, int) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.utils.PlayerCacheUtil.cacheBlockErrMsg(Player, String)
      Unused by Towny now, use PlayerCache.setBlockErrMsg(String) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.utils.SpawnUtil.sendToTownySpawn(Player, String[], TownyObject, String, boolean, boolean, SpawnType)
      since 0.102.0.14, use SpawnUtil.sendToTownySpawn(Player, String[], TownyObject, String, boolean, SpawnType) instead.
      com.palmergames.bukkit.util.BukkitTools.getCommandMap()
      Use Server.getCommandMap() instead.

      Constructor
      Description
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.Government(String)
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.Nation(String)
      com.palmergames.bukkit.towny.object.Resident(String)
